materials: Needle and thread for sewing eyes, nose…

rounds.rawInstruction: Chain 11, turn and crochet to the second chain from hook
rounds.summary: Create a foundation chain of 11 stitches and turn.
rounds.title: Foundation Chain

rounds.rawInstruction: 9sc, 4sc in the next st, 8sc, 3sc the the last st ( 24)
rounds.summary: Work single crochets and increases across the row.
rounds.title: Round 1

rounds.summary: Work in front loop only with increases.
rounds.title: Round 3

rounds.summary: Single crochet in every stitch around.
rounds.title: Round 5

rounds.summary: Single crochet in every stitch for four rounds.
rounds.title: Rounds 6-9

rounds.rawInstruction: Finish, cut and hide the yarn.
rounds.summary: Fasten off and weave in ends.
rounds.title: Finish off

rounds.rawInstruction: Chain 11 and do the same with bottom case but R3 do not FLO.
rounds.summary: Create foundation chain and follow previous pattern, working R3 normally.
rounds.title: Foundation Chain

rounds.summary: Single crochet in every stitch for three rounds.
rounds.title: Rounds 5-7

rounds.rawInstruction: Do not cut the yarn, crochet 2sc more and join with the bottom case on the next step.
rounds.summary: Work two additional single crochets without cutting yarn.
rounds.title: Prepare to join

rounds.rawInstruction: To join To connect 2 shells, use 10slst. FLO from the top shell, BLO from bottom shell.
rounds.summary: Slip stitch the two halves together using front and back loops.
rounds.title: Join shells

rounds.rawInstruction: 7sc in MR,do not join, just tie MR
rounds.summary: Work seven single crochets into a magic ring and tie closed.
rounds.title: Round 1

rounds.summary: Work five single crochets into a magic ring.
rounds.title: Round 1

rounds.summary: Single crochet in every stitch for two rounds.
rounds.title: Rounds 2-3

rounds.summary: Work two single crochets on each side.
rounds.title: Add side stitches

rounds.rawInstruction: Sew all parts, nose, eyes and cheeks to finish.
rounds.summary: Attach all components and embroider facial features.
rounds.title: Final assembly
